abilities.name: Combat Finesse
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with a (melee) action, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Terror of Widdershins Lane
abilities.text: Once per turn. After killing an enemy, this model may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, place this model into base contact with an enemy model within 6" of itself. It may then declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Umbra Execution
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If there are no different enemy models within 2" of the target, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Reconstitute
triggers.text: This model may remove a friendly marker in base contact with itself to heal 1.

triggers.name: Cruelty
triggers.text: Once per turn. Declare this action again.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Claustrophobia
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 1" of blocking terrain, it gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Secret Passage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared if this model is within 1" of blocking terrain. Place this model anywhere within range within 1" of blocking terrain.

triggers.name: Trail of Dusk
triggers.text: Immediately, make a Shadow Door marker in base contact with this model.
